/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/HotelManagement_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/BookingRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/DashboardService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/RoomRepository.cpp.o -o HotelManagement -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
